team.prompt:
# Compiled Sibyl Team Prompt

## Objective
Idea debate for Beyond Point Estimates: Sensitivity-Aware Training Data Attribution — 提出 TDA Robustness Value (TRV) 量化每个 test point 的归因稳定性，并基于稳定性信号自适应融合梯度方法 (IF) 与表示方法 (RepSim)。

## Workspace
Workspace: /Users/jinxulin/Research/sibyl-research-system/workspaces/AURA/current

## Output Contract
All non-paper outputs must use Chinese.

## Execution
Generate and debate research ideas for: Beyond Point Estimates: Sensitivity-Aware Training Data Attribution — 提出 TDA Robustness Value (TRV) 量化每个 test point 的归因稳定性，并基于稳定性信号自适应融合梯度方法 (IF) 与表示方法 (RepSim)。


Maintain a small candidate pool: keep 2-3 serious ideas alive until pilot evidence separates them. Do not collapse to a single idea too early unless the evidence is overwhelming.

Spawn teammates for remaining perspectives:
- innovator
- pragmatist
- theoretical
- contrarian
- interdisciplinary
- empiricist

Each reads /Users/jinxulin/Research/sibyl-research-system/workspaces/AURA/current/context/idea_context.md for background and writes to /Users/jinxulin/Research/sibyl-research-system/workspaces/AURA/current/idea/perspectives/<role>.md

After generating ideas, have teammates critique each other's work (score 1-10). Write critiques to /Users/jinxulin/Research/sibyl-research-system/workspaces/AURA/current/idea/debate/CRITIC_on_AUTHOR.md

Finally, synthesize all ideas and critiques into a final proposal at /Users/jinxulin/Research/sibyl-research-system/workspaces/AURA/current/idea/proposal.md. Pick the strongest idea, incorporating feedback.

Run exactly 2 critique rounds before final synthesis.
All non-paper output must be written in Chinese. Use Sonnet for teammates.

resume_action.description: Agent Team: 6人辩论生成研究提案（恢复：已完成 0/6） + Codex 独立审查
